title: Email to Board Feature Down?
excerpt:
All of my Email to Board functionality has stopped working this morning. 
Has anyone else noted this?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
All of my Email to Board functionality has stopped working this morning.

Has anyone else noted this?

posts.cookedHtml:

Let us know at support@monday.com if you do run into any problems or questions!
